$comment: SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for spacing + layout tokens. LOCKED per FRONTEND_DESIGN_PLAN.md Section 2.3 and 2.5. 4px-based scale mapped to Tailwind defaults — no one-off magic-number margins outside this scale (§2.3).

breakpoints.$comment: Section 2.5. Names locked. xs is implicit base (mobile-first).

contentWidth.$comment: Section 2.5: article body capped ~680-720px (68-72 Bengali chars/line); index grid container ~1024px. Wide screens get margin, not longer lines.
